creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 154333
Fix x11/mlterm pkg-plist issue

It fails to build on FreeBSD 10.1.

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: lib/libvte-mlterm.a
Error: Orphaned: lib/libvte-mlterm.so
Error: Orphaned: lib/libvte-mlterm.so.9
Error: Orphaned: lib/libvte-mlterm.so.9.0.0
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: lib/libvte-mlterm-2.91.a
Error: Missing: lib/libvte-mlterm-2.91.so
Error: Missing: lib/libvte-mlterm-2.91.so.9
Error: Missing: lib/libvte-mlterm-2.91.so.9.0.0
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1
